description: Create a Linux CI GitHub Actions workflow that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow should have a setup job that checks out the repository, syncs submodules, and installs required packages on an ubuntu-latest environment. Four dependent jobs, ubsan, asan, msan, and tsan, should run sequentially after setup, each testing with a different sanitizer (undefined, address, memory, and thread) by building and running et-test with cmake.
